message:
feat(ftui-tty): Unix input reader with poll + InputParser (bd-lff4p.4.3)

Replace stub poll_event/read_event with real implementation: poll(2)
on /dev/tty fd via nix, read raw bytes, feed through ftui-core
InputParser, serve parsed Events from a VecDeque. 10 new pipe-based
parity tests covering ASCII, arrows, Ctrl keys, F-keys, SGR mouse,
focus, bracketed paste, scroll, and modifier combos.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
